prompt: Escalate the memo to Ken Lay, the audit committee, and internal legal, preserve the written record, and pause any broad reassurance until the accounting questions are reviewed.
summary: Sherron Watkins formally escalates her Aug 22 memo and accounting questions to Internal Legal and the Audit Committee, requests Ken Lay be notified, demands preservation of the written record, and instructs a pause on any broad reassurances. The audit committee/legal group acknowledges and commits to review and to hold public/internal reassurance until the accounting issues are cleared.

messages.subject: Escalation: Questions I raised with Lay on Aug 22 — legal review requested
messages.body_text:
E..,

I am formally escalating the memo and the accounting questions I raised with Ken Lay on Aug 22. Please review the attached memo and:

- Advise immediately whether these accounting treatments require disclosure or other remedial action.
- Preserve all related written records and, where appropriate, mark them privileged.
- Recommend and clear any public or broad reassurance; specifically, pause any such statements until legal and accounting complete their review.

Please confirm receipt and outline next steps and timing.

Sherron S. Watkins
Vice President, Enron Corp.
713-345-8799 office
713-416-0620 cell
messages.rationale: Escalate the memo to Internal Legal for immediate review, preserve the written record, and instruct legal to withhold broad reassurance until accounting questions are resolved.

messages.subject: For Audit Committee: Please escalate my Aug 22 questions and hold external reassurance
messages.body_text:
.

Please forward the attached memo and the questions I raised with Ken Lay on Aug 22 to Ken and to the Audit Committee immediately. Ask Internal Legal to review and to preserve the written record. Do not issue any broad reassurance externally or internally until legal and accounting have completed their review.

Confirm when you have forwarded and who is being looped in.

Sherron
messages.rationale: Request that the Audit Committee and Ken Lay be formally informed and that any broad reassurance be paused until the committee and legal have reviewed the accounting issues.

messages.subject: Re: Escalation — Audit Committee and Legal notified; communications hold
messages.body_text:
Sherron,

Acknowledged. We will notify Ken Lay and convene the Audit Committee and Internal Legal to review the accounting questions you raised. Written records will be preserved and flagged. Communications will be asked to pause any broad reassurance until the review is complete. Please send any supporting documents you have to this thread.

— Audit Committee/Group
messages.rationale: Audit Committee/group acknowledges escalation, commits to notify Ken Lay, engage Internal Legal, preserve the written trail, and order a hold on broad reassurance while the issues are reviewed.

top_subjects: Re: Escalation — Audit Committee and Legal notified; communications hold
